results.name: Return to Feed from coaching features
results.reasoning: Feed page is functioning correctly with real content - shows user stories at top, post creation interface, sports category filters (For You, Following, All, Basketball, Soccer, Football), and actual posts with user content including Marcus Silva's soccer post with image and engagement options.
